[Home](https://sift.com)/E-Commerce Fraud Protection | Demo

# Free Demo | Fuel E-Commerce Growth Through Identity Trust

**Trust every transaction with identity-level insights from our Global Data Network of 1T+ annual events. Sift is the leading AI-powered fraud prevention platform recommended by industry analyst firms, fraud associations, and growing e-commerce businesses.**

**Protect your brand’s reputation and revenue.** Four out of five consumers would stop shopping on a site where they’d been a victim of account takeover, making fraud a threat to the bottom line and every user’s lifetime value.

**Cut off ATO at the source.** Detect subtle behavior shifts before they become patterns with purpose-built models designed to block fraud actors in real time.

**Connect the digital dots.** Link behavioral signals and activities across sessions, devices, and user touchpoints to detect suspicious patterns before they escalate.

**Predict risk and growth with confidence.** Sift delivers decisions with dimension through Identity Trust XD. Cross-dimensional context and insights sharpen decisioning accuracy, speeding up and strengthening fraud operations.

**Reinforce trust when it matters most.** Proactive notifications and adaptive 2FA strengthen customer confidence in your business’s ability to defend their data.

**Book a free demo to see Sift in action and get your e-commerce fraud questions answered.**
